calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration & To Nominate Arbitrators; Declaration Of David R. Isola In Support; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
A P P E A R A N C E:
Sharon L. Benson, Esq. of COLLINS COLLINS MUIR & TRAVER LLP 626/243-1100 for Respondent BUILDING ANALYTICS, INC. opposing party
Ms. Benson spoke with opposing counsel David R. Isola, Esq.. She represented that Mr. Isola is not opposed to nominating five arbitrators from the list of 10 proposed arbitrators. Based on this representation, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted the motion to compel arbitration. The following five neutral arbitrators were selected by the Court pursuant to CCP 128.1.6:
Martin Quinn, Daniel Weinstein, Jerry Spolter, Randall Wulf and Michael Shain. If both parties cannot agree to an arbitrator, then the Court will appoint one from the list of five. (AJR/cl) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
